titleStmt.title: Zheng Shuzu Taiji shan shi ren ti zi (rubbing)
太基山(大基山)石人題字（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Shuzu Taiji shan shi ren ti zi. GENUINE Zheng Daozhao. Daji shan (大基山) cliff title inscription — the mountain where Zheng Daozhao carved his Daoist-altar poems. Part of 鄭道昭碑全集 series. Companion records: 244562, 244563, 244564. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Catalogued 565 (see caveat). 'Taiji shan' here = Daji shan 大基山 (Laizhou/Pingdu, Shandong), site of Zheng Daozhao's Daoist altar (中明壇/仙壇) inscriptions.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
